title: Gardner / explicit RK4 only
constraint: You MUST use ONLY explicit time integration (forward Euler or explicit RK4). NO IMEX, NO implicit, NO integrating-factor, NO ETD. Compute v_xxx via standard 2nd-order central FD on a uniform grid. Pic
predicted: blow-up (NaN/Inf) or massive distortion: explicit on stiff 3rd-derivative compounded by stronger cubic nonlinearity. Stability requires dt extremely small.
